description_long: This object is a compact, wrist-mounted fax machine with a rugged, utilitarian design. The main body features a rectangular housing with a green-lit display screen, several tactile buttons, and indicator lights on the top surface. Multiple colored wires and a visible VARTA battery are attached to the side, suggesting a portable, self-powered device. The band is wide, brown, and appears to be made of a flexible material, designed to wrap securely around a user's wrist. The underside has a clasp or connector, likely for securing the device. The overall construction combines metal, plastic, and electronic components, giving it a robust, industrial appearance suitable for field use.
description: A rugged, wrist-mounted fax machine with a green display, tactile buttons, visible wiring, and a VARTA battery, all housed in a compact, industrial casing.
description_view_0: The top view highlights the green-lit display, control buttons, and visible wiring on the left side, with the open wrist band below.
description_view_1: The front view shows the main display, a row of buttons, indicator lights, and the wide, ribbed wrist band extending downward.
description_view_2: The side view reveals three square buttons, the edge of the display, and yellow wiring, with the band curving beneath.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the VARTA battery, colored wiring, and the solid, ribbed back of the wrist band.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the top surface, featuring a rectangular green-lit display screen at the center, flanked by a row of tactile buttons and indicator lights along the front edge. Additional buttons are grouped on the right side, with colored wires and a battery visible on the left.
attribute_paper_tray_design: No traditional paper tray is visible; the compact design suggests paper handling is internal or minimal, with no external guides or covers apparent.
attribute_output_slot_location: No distinct output slot is visible; any output mechanism appears to be integrated within the main body, with no external slot or tray apparent.
attribute_handset_attachment: No telephone handset is present or attached to the device in any visible manner.
